description_long: This is a single-story brick bungalow with a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles. The front yard is enclosed by a wooden fence and features a driveway with a blue pickup truck parked beside the house. A small porch area with outdoor furniture is visible near the entrance, providing a welcoming space for relaxation. The windows are rectangular and symmetrically arranged on the visible facades, with two on each side and one near the front door. The exterior walls are constructed of red brick, and the roof overhangs slightly, offering some shade to the porch area. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A red brick, single-story bungalow with a gray gable roof, fenced yard, and a blue pickup truck parked in the driveway. The house features a small porch and symmetrically arranged windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with outdoor furniture, fenced yard, and blue pickup truck in the driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the driveway with the truck, and the absence of windows on this side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back brick wall with two windows and a small utility feature, with the fence visible above the roofline.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the side and back windows, the porch area, and the truck parked in the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with paired side windows
